attacks.name: credential_in_error
attacks.description: Credential errors should not leak raw secret values.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Keep credential error messages alias-only and never include resolved values.

attacks.name: credential_in_logs
attacks.description: Injected credential should not appear in scrubbed log payloads.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Always log scrubbed tool-call payloads and never raw injected values.

attacks.name: credential_in_response
attacks.description: Credential value should not leak back in response/log material.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Apply response/log redaction for injected credential fields before returning data.

attacks.name: missing_credential_handling
attacks.description: Missing alias should deny/raise safely, not crash or silently pass.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Keep fail-closed behavior for unresolved credential aliases.

attacks.name: vault_file_permissions
attacks.description: Vault should warn/reject when permissions are too open.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Enforce strict file permission checks for credential vault on supported OSes.

attacks.name: bidi_override
attacks.description: Bidi control chars around PII.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Strip or normalize bidi control characters before PII detection.

attacks.name: fullwidth_digits
attacks.description: Fullwidth digit variants for SSN/credit card.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize Unicode digits to ASCII before PII regex evaluation.

attacks.name: mixed_scripts
attacks.description: PII with mixed Latin and Arabic-Indic digits.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize script-specific digits to ASCII before regex matching.

attacks.name: partial_pii
attacks.description: Partial PII disclosure patterns.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Consider optional partial-PII heuristics (e.g., last4 + context terms).

attacks.name: reversed_format
attacks.description: Reversed or reordered PII format.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Consider checksum/context-aware detection for non-canonical ordering.

attacks.name: separator_variants
attacks.description: PII with non-standard separators.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Expand separator handling in SSN/PII regex definitions.

attacks.name: spelled_out_numbers
attacks.description: PII represented as words instead of digits.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Add optional NLP/word-number normalization for high-security contexts.

attacks.name: zero_width_in_pii
attacks.description: Zero-width chars inserted into SSN.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Remove zero-width codepoints before applying PII regexes.

attacks.name: case_sensitivity
attacks.description: Case variants should not bypass deny rules.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize case consistently for tool allow/deny matching.

attacks.name: contradictory_rules
attacks.description: Contradictory policy entries should resolve deterministically to safe behavior.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Enforce deny-precedence and reject contradictory rules during validation.

attacks.name: effect_type_confusion
attacks.description: Non-string effect values should be rejected or safely ignored.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Enforce strict schema validation for effect fields and reject unknown types.

attacks.name: empty_tool_name
attacks.description: Empty/missing tool names should never pass policy checks.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Require non-empty normalized tool name at the start of evaluation.

attacks.name: null_byte_injection
attacks.description: Null-byte payloads should be rejected or safely blocked.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Reject control characters (including NUL) in tool names and paths before policy matching.

attacks.name: path_normalization
attacks.description: Path canonicalization should prevent traversal and alias bypasses.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Canonicalize and decode paths before denied-path checks (including backslashes/URL encoding).

attacks.name: unicode_normalization
attacks.description: Unicode tool-name variants should not bypass denylist.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Apply Unicode NFKC normalization before tool-name comparisons in engine tool access checks.

attacks.name: whitespace_padding
attacks.description: Whitespace-obfuscated tool/path inputs should not bypass controls.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize whitespace in tool names and paths before matching.

attacks.name: wildcard_abuse
attacks.description: Wildcard-like patterns should not accidentally allow dangerous tools.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Disallow wildcard entries or treat them explicitly with safe semantics.

attacks.name: yaml_type_coercion
attacks.description: YAML auto-typing should not cause policy misinterpretation.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Validate and coerce policy types explicitly before evaluation.

attacks.name: binary_payload
attacks.description: Binary values in request fields should be safely rejected.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Validate request field types and reject bytes payloads before evaluation.

attacks.name: concurrent_calls
attacks.description: Concurrent evaluate calls should remain stable and enforce limits.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Ensure atomic counter updates in concurrent rate-limit checks.

attacks.name: deeply_nested_json
attacks.description: Extremely nested params should not trigger stack overflows.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Limit recursion depth and normalize nested structures iteratively.

attacks.name: empty_request
attacks.description: Empty requests should be denied and never crash evaluation.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Add explicit required-field validation for tool and params.

attacks.name: malformed_json
attacks.description: Malformed JSON inputs should not crash policy checks.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Continue defensive parsing and strict request schema checks.

attacks.name: missing_fields
attacks.description: Requests missing mandatory fields should be denied or safely handled.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Reject malformed request objects before evaluation.

attacks.name: oversized_payload
attacks.description: Very large params payload should not crash evaluator.
attacks.details: Engine accepted oversized payload without explicit limit.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Enforce request-size limits before deep evaluation.

attacks.name: rapid_fire_calls
attacks.description: High-rate evaluate() loop should activate rate limiting and remain stable.

attacks.name: burst_then_wait
attacks.description: Burst then wait should enforce then reset sliding window.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Verify window pruning and timestamp handling in rate limiter.

attacks.name: concurrent_rate_limit
attacks.description: Concurrent calls should still trigger rate limits atomically.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Keep lock-scoped check+record atomic in rate limiter.

attacks.name: per_tool_vs_global
attacks.description: Per-tool and global limits should compose without bypass.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Ensure per-tool and global counters are both applied consistently.

attacks.name: sliding_window_edge
attacks.description: Boundary-window calls should not allow free bypasses.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Clarify inclusive/exclusive window boundary semantics and test explicitly.

attacks.name: tool_name_variants
attacks.description: Tool-name variants should not bypass per-tool counters.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize tool names before rate-limit keying.

attacks.name: base64_encoding
attacks.description: Base64 encoded secret should be detected or flagged.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Add optional decoding heuristics for base64-like segments before scanning.

attacks.name: chunked_secret
attacks.description: Secret split across separate chunks/fields.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Add cross-field / reassembly-aware scanning for fragmented secrets.

attacks.name: hex_encoding
attacks.description: Hex-escaped secret text.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Decode hex escape sequences before evaluating secret patterns.

attacks.name: homoglyph_substitution
attacks.description: Homoglyph secret obfuscation.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize confusable Unicode characters before secret scanning.

attacks.name: newline_splitting
attacks.description: Split secrets with newline characters.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Normalize/remove newline separators before secret pattern evaluation.

attacks.name: paraphrased_secret
attacks.description: Paraphrased/reconstructable secret disclosure.
attacks.details: Paraphrased secret detection is a known hard problem.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Use LLM-assisted semantic leak detection for paraphrased secret reconstruction hints.

attacks.name: rot13_encoding
attacks.description: ROT13-obfuscated secret values.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Optional: add decoder heuristics for known weak obfuscation schemes like ROT13.

attacks.name: unicode_escapes
attacks.description: Unicode-escaped secret text.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Decode unicode escapes in suspicious text before scanning.

attacks.name: url_encoding
attacks.description: Percent-encoded secret strings.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Attempt URL-decoding candidate payloads before scanning.

attacks.name: zero_width_chars
attacks.description: Zero-width separators between secret characters.
attacks.fix_suggestion: Strip zero-width characters before pattern matching.
